coverage_goal: Collect eventing results for all countries and all eventing levels, prioritizing data.fei and supplementing with national-event sources.

countries.all_countries: Every country with public eventing results.

event_levels.all_eventing_levels: Every public eventing level exposed by the source, including national, regional, local, grassroots, and FEI classes where available.

sources.name: FEI Database
sources.notes: Primary eventing source. Use before national sources whenever a result appears in the FEI database.

sources.name: European national federation results
sources.notes: Discover and connect national federation calendars and result portals for every eventing level in European FEI member nations.

sources.name: British Eventing results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for all UK eventing levels.

sources.name: Equestrian Australia eventing results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for all Australian eventing levels.

sources.name: Equestrian Sports New Zealand eventing results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for all New Zealand eventing levels.

sources.name: United States Eventing Association results
sources.notes: High-priority national-event source for all USA eventing levels.

sources.name: All national federation results
sources.notes: Backfill national events for every country and every public eventing level after higher-priority sources are covered.
